name: rubric/aggregator.sh picks up the orchestrator-emitted YAML and includes the new rules in active.json with source_namespace + origin annotations preserved
command:
OUT=/tmp/cl564-r13-$$; mkdir -p $OUT/out && cat > $OUT/s.html <<'HTML'

Encrypt data at rest

All Terraform resources MUST enable encryption.

HTML cat > $OUT/reg.yaml </dev/null; bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/aggregator.sh" --root $OUT/out --format json > $OUT/active.json 2>/dev/null; python3 -c 'import json; d=json.load(open("'$OUT'/active.json")); rs=[r for r in d.get("rules",[]) if "r13-src" in r.get("id","")]; exit(0 if rs and rs[0].get("source_namespace")=="us-government" and rs[0].get("origin")=="plugin" else 1)' && echo aggregator-picks-up-emitted-rules 1>&2; rm -rf $OUT
